---
title: "Session_29"
author: " Dhruvi Sheth 22294"
date: "13 April, 2026"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
# find the eigenvector and eigenvalues of the 

e <- eigen(m)
e
```

```{r}
# the largest eighenvalue is t$vectorshe first principle component
pc1 <- x1 * e$vectors[1,1 + y1 * e$vectors[2,1]]

```
